name: CrossRef DOI verifier
description: Verify a DOI resolves on CrossRef and pull the authoritative metadata (title, authors with given/family split, year, container/journal, volume, issue, pages, publisher). Use to validate a citation before quoting it, catch typos in user-supplied DOIs, or enrich an OpenAlex hit with publisher-confirmed bibliographic fields.

dois.description: List of DOIs to verify. Either bare ('10.1234/...') or 'https://doi.org/10.1234/...' — the prefix is stripped automatically. Up to 30 per call.
